title: gilia brecciarum subsp. brecciarum
intro: Gilia brecciarum subsp. brecciarum, also known as the Brecciarum gilia, is a flowering plant species belonging to the Polemoniaceae family. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Gilia brecciarum subsp. brecciarum include its ability to boost the immune system and reduce fever, as well as its potential to act as an antioxidant and protect against cell damage. Gilia brecciarum subsp. brecciarum can be prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, and is also sometimes used in tincture form to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
